name: Sample Collection Barcode
script:
import barcode
from barcode.writer import ImageWriter
import base64
from io import BytesIO

if not doc.custom_barcode_html:
    code = barcode.get("code128", doc.name, writer=ImageWriter())

    buffer = BytesIO()
    code.write(buffer)

    doc.custom_barcode_html = base64.b64encode(buffer.getvalue()).decode()
